templates.name: .Ceragon Radio

items.name: Wireless Radio Walk
items.description:
Ceragon proprietary radio performance bulk walk master item.
  ifName:             1.3.6.1.2.1.31.1.1.1.1 (for {#IFNAME} LLD macro)
  RSL (dBm):          1.3.6.1.4.1.2281.10.5.1.1.2
  TX Power (dBm):     1.3.6.1.4.1.2281.10.5.1.1.3
  TX Freq (kHz):      1.3.6.1.4.1.2281.10.5.2.1.3
  RX Freq (kHz):      1.3.6.1.4.1.2281.10.5.2.1.4
  Capacity (Mbps?):   1.3.6.1.4.1.2281.10.5.2.1.16
  TX Modulation:      1.3.6.1.4.1.2281.10.5.2.1.19
  RX Modulation:      1.3.6.1.4.1.2281.10.5.2.1.21
  RSL MIMO/div (dBm): 1.3.6.1.4.1.2281.10.5.2.1.22
All entries indexed by ifIndex (268451905 on test IP50EX-P).

discovery_rules.name: General Interface Discovery
discovery_rules.description: Discover IF-MIB interfaces. Radio interface excluded from Ethernet-style triggers via {$IFCONTROL} override.

item_prototypes.name: Interface {#IFNAME}({#IFDESCR}): Inbound packets discarded
item_prototypes.description:
MIB: IF-MIB
The number of inbound packets chosen to be discarded even though no errors had been detected.

item_prototypes.name: Interface {#IFNAME}({#IFDESCR}): Inbound packets with errors
item_prototypes.description:
MIB: IF-MIB
The number of inbound packets that contained errors preventing them from being delivered to a higher-layer protocol.

item_prototypes.name: Interface {#IFNAME}({#IFDESCR}): Outbound packets discarded
item_prototypes.description:
MIB: IF-MIB
The number of outbound packets chosen to be discarded even though no errors had been detected.

item_prototypes.name: Interface {#IFNAME}({#IFDESCR}): Outbound packets with errors
item_prototypes.description:
MIB: IF-MIB
The number of outbound packets that could not be transmitted because of errors.

item_prototypes.name: Interface {#IFNAME}({#IFDESCR}): Bits received
item_prototypes.description:
MIB: IF-MIB
ifHCInOctets — the total number of octets received on the interface. Calculated as bits/s via CHANGE_PER_SECOND.

item_prototypes.name: Interface {#IFNAME}({#IFDESCR}): Bits sent
item_prototypes.description:
MIB: IF-MIB
ifHCOutOctets — the total number of octets transmitted out of the interface. Calculated as bits/s via CHANGE_PER_SECOND.

item_prototypes.name: Interface {#IFNAME}({#IFDESCR}): Speed
item_prototypes.description:
MIB: IF-MIB
ifHighSpeed — an estimate of the interface's current bandwidth in Mb/s (megabits per second). Multiplied by 1,000,000 to give bps.

item_prototypes.name: Interface {#IFNAME}({#IFDESCR}): Operational status
item_prototypes.description:
MIB: IF-MIB
ifOperStatus — the current operational state of the interface.

trigger_prototypes.name: Interface {#IFNAME}({#IFDESCR}): Link down
trigger_prototypes.description:
Triggers when the operational status is down and the interface was previously up.
Set {$IFCONTROL:"{#IFNAME}"}=0 to suppress for a specific interface.

item_prototypes.name: Interface {#IFNAME}({#IFDESCR}): Interface type
item_prototypes.description:
MIB: IF-MIB
ifType — the type of interface.

trigger_prototypes.name: Interface {#IFNAME}({#IFDESCR}): High bandwidth usage
trigger_prototypes.description: The utilization of the network interface is close to its estimated maximum bandwidth.

trigger_prototypes.expression:
change(/.Ceragon Radio/net.if.speed[ifHighSpeed.{#SNMPINDEX}])<0 and last(/.Ceragon Radio/net.if.speed[ifHighSpeed.{#SNMPINDEX}])>0
and (
last(/.Ceragon Radio/net.if.type[ifType.{#SNMPINDEX}])=6 or
last(/.Ceragon Radio/net.if.type[ifType.{#SNMPINDEX}])=7 or
last(/.Ceragon Radio/net.if.type[ifType.{#SNMPINDEX}])=11 or
last(/.Ceragon Radio/net.if.type[ifType.{#SNMPINDEX}])=62 or
last(/.Ceragon Radio/net.if.type[ifType.{#SNMPINDEX}])=69 or
last(/.Ceragon Radio/net.if.type[ifType.{#SNMPINDEX}])=117
)
and
(last(/.Ceragon Radio/net.if.status[ifOperStatus.{#SNMPINDEX}])<>2)
trigger_prototypes.name: Interface {#IFNAME}({#IFDESCR}): Ethernet has changed to lower speed than it was before
trigger_prototypes.description: This Ethernet connection has transitioned down from its known maximum speed. Acknowledge to close manually.

discovery_rules.name: Wireless Interface Discovery
discovery_rules.description:
Discover Ceragon radio interfaces from the proprietary radio performance walk.
Only interfaces in the .10.5 subtree appear — typically one radio interface per device.
Filter uses {$NET.IF.CARRIERNAME.MATCHES} (default: .*[Rr]adio.*).

item_prototypes.name: Interface {#IFNAME}: RSL
item_prototypes.description:
MIB: CERAGON-IP50-MIB
cerRfHalfChannelCurrentRxSignalLevel (1.3.6.1.4.1.2281.10.5.1.1.2.{ifIndex})
Receive signal level in dBm. Integer value, no multiplier required.

trigger_prototypes.name: Interface {#IFNAME}: RSL High
trigger_prototypes.description: RSL is abnormally high (>{$RSL.HIGH} dBm). May indicate near-end reflections, interference, or misconfiguration. Verify against link budget.

trigger_prototypes.name: Interface {#IFNAME}: RSL Low
trigger_prototypes.description: RSL is below acceptable threshold (<{$RSL.LOW} dBm). Link may be affected by rain fade, obstruction, or equipment issues.

item_prototypes.name: Interface {#IFNAME}: TX Power
item_prototypes.description:
MIB: CERAGON-IP50-MIB
cerRfHalfChannelCurrentTxPower (1.3.6.1.4.1.2281.10.5.1.1.3.{ifIndex})
Current transmit power in dBm. Integer value, no multiplier required.

item_prototypes.name: Interface {#IFNAME}: TX Frequency
item_prototypes.description:
MIB: CERAGON-IP50-MIB
cerRfHalfChannelStatusTxFrequency (1.3.6.1.4.1.2281.10.5.2.1.3.{ifIndex})
Actual TX frequency in Hz. OID reports kHz — multiplied by 1000.

item_prototypes.name: Interface {#IFNAME}: RX Frequency
item_prototypes.description:
MIB: CERAGON-IP50-MIB
cerRfHalfChannelStatusRxFrequency (1.3.6.1.4.1.2281.10.5.2.1.4.{ifIndex})
Actual RX frequency in Hz. OID reports kHz — multiplied by 1000.

item_prototypes.name: Interface {#IFNAME}: TX Modulation
item_prototypes.description:
MIB: CERAGON-IP50-MIB
cerRfHalfChannelStatusTxModulation (1.3.6.1.4.1.2281.10.5.2.1.19.{ifIndex})
Current TX adaptive modulation state. See Ceragon Modulation valuemap.
Note: valuemap codes unverified — confirm against Ceragon IP50 MIB documentation.

item_prototypes.name: Interface {#IFNAME}: RX Modulation
item_prototypes.description:
MIB: CERAGON-IP50-MIB
cerRfHalfChannelStatusRxModulation (1.3.6.1.4.1.2281.10.5.2.1.21.{ifIndex})
Current RX adaptive modulation state. See Ceragon Modulation valuemap.
Note: valuemap codes unverified — confirm against Ceragon IP50 MIB documentation.

item_prototypes.name: Interface {#IFNAME}: RSL MIMO/Diversity
item_prototypes.description:
MIB: CERAGON-IP50-MIB
(1.3.6.1.4.1.2281.10.5.2.1.22.{ifIndex})
Second channel RSL — likely XPIC/MIMO or diversity channel receive level.
On test IP50EX-P: main RSL = -35 dBm, this = -68 dBm (33 dB below main, suggesting inactive XPIC port or severe cross-pol attenuation).
Needs verification against Ceragon MIB documentation.

item_prototypes.name: Interface {#IFNAME}: Capacity
item_prototypes.description:
MIB: CERAGON-IP50-MIB
(1.3.6.1.4.1.2281.10.5.2.1.16.{ifIndex})
Estimated link capacity. OID reported 600 on test IP50EX-P — assumed Mbps, multiplied by 1,000,000 for bps.
Needs confirmation against Ceragon MIB documentation.

macros.description: Filter for wireless/radio interface discovery. Matches 'Radio: Slot 1, Port 1' on Ceragon IP50.
Filter out loopback and null interfaces
RSL high alert threshold (dBm) — abnormally strong signal, may indicate near-end reflections or interference
RSL low alert threshold (dBm) — signal degradation warning, link at risk. Adjust per link budget.
